[Umbrella] MaWo - A Master Worker framework on top of YARN Services

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.

fields.description:
Build Common module for MaWo application.
 This module should include defination of Task. A Task should contain
 * TaskID
 * Task Command
 * Task Environment
 * Task Timeout
 * Task Type
 ** Simple Task
 *** Its a single Task
 ** Composite Task
 *** Its a composition of multiple simple tasks
 ** Teardown Task
 *** Its a last task to be executed after a job is finished
 ** Null Task
 *** Its a null task
